name: sn2-chloride_reaction_profile
prompt: Run the reaction-profile task for the sn2-chloride reaction using the PM7 (mopac) method in the gas phase with charge -1. Pass the reactant, product, and TS guess (shared atom ordering) with --reactant/--product/--ts-guess. Report the activation free energy delta_G_activation in kcal/mol as the headline value, plus the reaction free energy and the IRC connectivity verdict. State the method and charge used. Use multiplicity 1. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
